case_title: CARMEN CAGNAYO VS. ROSS STORES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAGNAYO, CARMEN AS TO DEFENDANT ROSS STORES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2012 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-30-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-30-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY HEDDA ANIBIGNO--ASST. STORE MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAGNAYO, CARMEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSS STORES, INC. $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,585.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY CAGNAYO, CARMEN ROSS STORES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-30-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR (HEDDA ANIBIGNO) FILED BY DEFENDANT ROSS STORES, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ROSS STORES, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID MCDONALD. FILED BY CAGNAYO, CARMEN ROSS STORES, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ROSS STORES, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CAGNAYO, CARMEN AS TO DEFENDANT ROSS STORES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
